name: core_no_adapter_imports
description: dis/src/core/** must not import from adapters/
message: core must not import adapters (DIP — coding_standards §2)

name: ports_no_adapter_imports
description: dis/src/ports/** must not import from adapters/
message: ports must not import adapters (ports are the narrow waist)

name: core_no_fetch
message: core must not perform network I/O (no fetch)

name: core_no_xhr
message: core must not perform network I/O (no XMLHttpRequest)

name: core_no_sql_literals
description: dis/src/core/** must not contain raw SQL
message: core must not contain raw SQL literals

name: supabase_sdk_only_in_supabase_adapters
message: @supabase/supabase-js is restricted to Supabase adapter modules

name: aws_sdk_only_in_aws_adapters
message: @aws-sdk/* is restricted to AWS adapter modules
